subject: FW: FW: OFFER TO PURCHASE YOUR 2007 SK76++ sn 760667
body:
________________________________

From: LVJET@aol.com [mailto:LVJET@aol.com] 
Sent: Monday, May 12, 2008 11:22 AM
To: Rahna Jalashgar
Cc: DKIESQ@aol.com; gmax1@ellmax.com; Rich Kahn;
slancaster@bristolassociates.com
Subject: Fwd: FW: OFFER TO PURCHASE YOUR 2007 SK76++ sn 760667


MESSAGE FOR JE:  IMPORTANT
Darren, Rhona, Lesley, Rich,
I don't know who is putting messages into JE,
Sean has an offer of 12.3M and feels the buyer would go to 12.6M for S76
see below attachment and please advise how JE would like to proceed.
Darren, I believe this is the Brazilian buyer again.
Larry V
